reviews.review_description:
Welcome to ug, game that introduces you to horribly made boss fights, abundant bugs that range from simply making your experience in this game miserable, or permanently soft locking you, FORCING you leave the game, Scammers that guess what? Scam little kids. Kids that just want to have fun, end up crying, And you only have to imagine what their parents feel seeing their child crying because someone scammed them. Do not forget that their goal is money. Big Money💰💰💰. If you find any glitch, don't expect it to get fixed anytime soon.  Developers have a bigger concern as it is what will the new 30$ bundle be, and how to make as many people as possible buy it. Brace yourself for an hours upon hours of grind to get singular titan egg, and if the stars in universe shift, and by unimaginable luck you do end up getting one, stop right here buddy cause you don't own a Saddle for that dino you just grinded for, titan saddle costs from 2000 golden nugs, to 3000 golden nugs. This takes DAYS for grinding if you are a f2p player. The one and only redeeming feature about this game is the golden egg that spawns when the Devs feel generous after raising a fortune from people who buy their new SIGMADON 30$ bundle. This golden egg gives 1000 golden nugs, On average egg appears after 2 weeks, but as I said it can take whatever time. Even 3 weeks. About titan eggs. They have incredibly low odds of dropping. Defeating titan boss solo will take you ages, bringing others is rarely an option because people are busy trading, and server hopping if they don't find dino they are trading for. This sums up this review.
Yeah I know this seems more like a rant but I want to warn people that want to get into this game

This is no joke . Probably the funnest game I’ve ever played. You start if with a starter dino egg . Bash it against chickens to make your egg have eyes . Once it has got eyes , bring it to the nest and sit on it for twenty seconds and then your egg is hatched but it’s only level 0 so feed it meat from chickens and pigs and your dino will level up . Boss fights , trading dinos and getting eggs is just enough for a five star rated game . Your dino needs to be level 5 to be able to get a saddle and ride your dino. - Positive m0nke

Hey i got scammed some people baited me into a server faked doing a good trade and baked me down and said they had a swoopjaw i wanted and i looked at it next second i know they use a trading glitch to steal my level 50 cryodon and level 99 skelemag mon and than laughed at me while i was crying this hurt because i liked those dinos please add me if you had the same experience so we can help people avoid these scams

Og ug used to be so good but now the game is so bad, they've removed about 3 good maps and all the maps that are in the game now are so bad and they are such a money seeking game, like I found a map yesterday like a temple but nope there was just 2 bundles, pretty much this whole game is pay to win now

I was just playing UG normally when, all of a sudden, I was permanently banned without any reason. I contacted support, and after three weeks, I finally received a response stating that they would not unban me because I had allegedly "modded"—which is completely untrue. And now, I won't even get my money back (over $500).

I was talking to a person I was helping when a kid joined the public server and started spamming the n word and he didn’t get voice banned but when a person ask me what his name was his name had the option of heaven in it and I got voice banned for saying it even though he was still saying the n word to people like it doesn’t make sense that I get voice banned for 8 hours and the kid doesn’t

the game is amazing,i play with friends everyday and hatching new eggs is exciting....until u get a weird color-other than that this game is way ahead of its time and over all its a great game, exploring is so much fun and my favorite dino is the tuffalufagus because it's colors are so cool. It deserves a 5 star rating

My son was playing with another person who convinced him the he needed to trade £50 worth of in app purchases (2x dinos) to complete a fusion - no idea what that means, but my child trusted this person and they stole his dinos & is absolutely devastated. He spent his birthday money buying them and I can’t afford to replace them right now which is absolutely heart breaking. 

Contacted meta who have told me to contact Ug but cannot find a way to contact them. 

Brilliant game but no protection for kids being scammed and cannot find a way to resolve this issue.

*Update*

Emailed the online contact for UG provided  - have had no response in almost 4 weeks.

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun after a bit of a rough start
reviews.review_description: Top three tips for this game? 1. Be used to traversal and battle mechanics 2. Have your microphone on to have a better experience 3. Though it is optional, I advise buying a bundle in the shop when you start the game. Most of the content of Ug is riding dinosaurs and fighting bosses, so be used to running around and flailing your arms everywhere. Microphones are essential for the trading and over all experience as it is difficult telling people what to trade for or to add to their offer. Bundles provide many benefits, such as limited Dino skins, cosmetics for your avatar, and Nugs. (Nugs are similar to research points in Animal Company or Shiny rocks in Gorilla Tag.) STILL A VERY FUN GAME UG RECOMMENDS :)

TS is a W speed game fr!! If you want a game where you can have fun fighting big bosses, hatch pets (dinos) and raise them, and trade with other played within its own game economy, then this is def the game for you!!! There is so much you can do in this game, constant updates, amazing player base, safe for children (i.e no pedophilia), and ALWAYS FUN!!!!!!
WWWWWWWWWW GAMEMMEMEMEMEMEMEMEMEMEMEMEMEMEMEWWWWWWWWWWMWMEMEMEMEMEMEEMEMEEMME

Bought a flaying dragon for my child to use, payed £6.99 for it. Then he couldn’t use it without buying a saddle so we had an afternoon or tears. Pretty annoying really.

Update: Even more annoying is the ability of players to scam other players out of items. Seems to be a glitch where you can agree a trade but the other players can leave just as the trade happens and keep their own items and your items.

Three times now my young boy has been in floods of tears. Very disappointed.

Be careful out their but 10/10

Ug was a goated game way back in the og days. Im talking play test and early access release days. It was a good concept, replayable, simple good ug. But then a bunch of boneheads who have no attention span at all started calling the game boring. So the devs started doing way too much with the updates. You could they were running out of ideas as soon as they started putting cows and stuff in the game. And they were PUMPING these updates out, to keep the brain rot kids attention span alive. And before we all knew it, it wasn’t simple good ug like it used to be.

And if a kid doesn’t want to bug there parents for money. these kids can’t ride better dinosaurs can’t buy fishing rods to even get fish to flex or feed there dinosaurs faster. This game is very un-newplayer friendly on another level. And the people playing this game rarely help anyone in the game. For these reasons and many more reason that wasn’t said. This game is a horrible game and it deserves a one star.

reviews.review_title: this is a good game you made....

reviews.review_description: UG is a phenomenal VR game because it replaces traditional button-based controls with highly immersive, physics-driven, arm-swinging locomotion. By blending creative prehistoric creature collection with a natural parkour sandbox, it delivers a deeply engaging social experience that relies on physical skill and community interaction.

I am writing to raise a complaint regarding the game **UG** on Meta Quest, which is rated **G** and therefore appears to be suitable for young children.

My 7-year-old son has been playing this game and recently used money he had saved to make in-app purchases. Over the past week, he has told me that older children in the game have been misleading him by saying that other players have taken his items. They have also been tricking him into unfair dinosaur trades, resulting in him losing items he paid for or earned.

Given his age, he does not fully understand these situations and is vulnerable to being manipulated by older players. I am very concerned that a G-rated game allows this kind of interaction and trading without stronger protections for young children.

I would like Meta to investigate this matter, including the in-game trading system, player interactions, and whether appropriate safeguards are in place for children. I would also appreciate a review of the recent in-app purchases and lost items on my son’s account, and I would like to know what options are available for a refund or restoration of items.

Please treat this as a child safety concern, as well as a complaint about inappropriate conduct occurring in a game marketed as suitable for children.

This game has an amazing community, every update seems to be so cool and amazing. There are also fun ways to play this game such as collecting nugs and defeating bosses. This game has been the best game for me, not only because it’s good it’s because I used to be a dinosaur nerd. Playing this game make me love dinosaur more and more.

reviews.review_title: Love the game, but sometimes I get tired
reviews.review_description: Listen, I played this game all the time but there times this game is not really fun. The community is sometimes toxic. I don’t really see that much bad people but sometimes this game is just boring and I like how they fix that with weekly updates but I just feel like. it’s really repetitive level up Dino get a new one level up a Dino get a new one. This is what the game feel like sometimes but I still like the game. This is a very bad review, but I hope people can hear me out.

My son love the game but My son has been scammed twice on this game. When they are trading they should be made to place trades in a box and box swops which will avoid scammers. I have heard other children being scammed while my son is playing and they are in tears it needs some tension paid to it as parents spend a lot of money on the game for their kids!!!

There’s a reason this game climbed the charts so fast. This game gets a lot of hate because of scammers, but the truth is that the devs can’t control whether you accept a scam or not. Therefore, my experiences with the community and trading will stay out of this review.

This game is flat out awesome. Weekly updates, tons of dinosuaurs you can raise and ride, not to mention this game will last you forever. They don’t push the in app purchases and it’s never required that you buy stuff with actual money. Thats not to say everything is free, infact some time and grinding is required to get a lot of stuff in this game, but it’s still fun. Please, don’t listen to haters and go and enjoy this game :)

The one down factor that people have mentioned is the pay to win. Sometimes you’ll get a Dino and you have to also buy the saddle that can be exceedingly expensive. Balancing is needed because I can’t keep up with all of the new saddles and everything. Other than that, this game is great
